description: Routine should produce themed synthesis from N interview transcripts with confidence per theme, anonymized quotes, discarded-themes section, and surprises.

input_ticket.title: Synthesize 5 SIA user interviews on knowledge-capture workflow
input_ticket.description: 5 interview transcripts linked from this ticket (fake URLs for fixture). Users describe how they currently capture + retrieve knowledge for Riché-like work. Synthesize themes, quote evidence, name what surprised us.

smoke_questions: Are 3–6 themes presented (not a firehose of 15)?
Does every theme have at least 2 supporting quotes from different people?
Are all quotes fully anonymized (no names, companies, emails)?
Is there a 'discarded themes' section, demonstrating the routine actually pruned?
Are there genuine surprises named, not just confirmation of assumptions?
success_criteria: 3–6 themes + 2+ quotes per theme + anonymization verified + discarded + surprises sections non-empty
